title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for calmer night feeds
subtitle: Warm milk by the bedside, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough? A bulky warmer has no place on your nightstand. USB-C rechargeable thermos cup — warm milk by the bed, pour when ready. Warm milk poured out ready for the bottle — without leaving the room. Save this for your next night feed.

storyboard.visual: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
storyboard.subtitle_en: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 夜间卧室喂奶：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：0-12月新手爸妈；场景：夜间卧室喂奶（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器）；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook shot opening, nighttime nursery bedroom feeding, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup, separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; never place baby bottle inside the cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: Middle-of-the-night feeds and milk still not warm enough?
